form.formComment: Good starter. Last start finished 4th over 531m at this track beaten 14 lengths (31.63) behind Messina Miss in a Grade 6 on April 12. Has run slick time here with a 22.82 PB at the distance. Go close.

form.formComment: Placed last time (23.10) at this track in a Grade 6, finishing third and beaten 5.5 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and five places from seven starts. Looks a key chance on best form.

form.formComment: Finished third last start (23.28) at big odds over 400m at this track. Will need a little luck early from the draw. One of the better hopes.

form.formComment: Has hit the frame at his last three runs, the latest finishing second at big odds in 23.03 at this track. Looks to have the job ahead.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Angle Park to win by 1.75 lengths in 19.94, beating Binnaway Wizard. Last start finished last on April 12 over 400m at this track behind Grand Perfection beaten 8 lengths (23.49) in a Other. Must be included.
